care.summary: Nearly indestructible foliage plant with broad, lance-shaped leaves; tolerates neglect, low light, and dry air.
care.light: Low to medium indirect light; avoid direct sun
care.water: Water when top inch of soil is dry; reduce in winter
care.fertilizer: Light feeding 2-3 times per year is sufficient
common_issues: Brown leaf tips from fluoride or chlorine in tap water
Slow growth is normal; do not over-fertilize
tips: One of the best plants for very low light corners
Use filtered or aged water to prevent leaf-tip burn
Wipe leaves occasionally to remove dust and keep them glossy
